notableEvents.label: Jackson Merrill GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Umpire reviewed (play at 1st), call on the field was overturned: Jackson Merrill grounds into a double play, shortstop Willy Adames to second baseman Luis Arraez to first baseman Casey Schmitt. Manny Machado out at 2nd. Jackson Merrill out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Throwing error
notableEvents.detail: Matt Chapman strikes out swinging. Jared Oliva to 3rd. Jared Oliva steals (1) 2nd base. Jared Oliva to 3rd. Throwing error by catcher Freddy Fermin.

notableEvents.label: Harrison Bader GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Harrison Bader grounds into a double play, third baseman Manny Machado to second baseman Jake Cronenworth to first baseman Gavin Sheets. Jung Hoo Lee out at 2nd. Harrison Bader out at 1st.
